---
name: Documentation Issue
about: Report missing, outdated, or unclear documentation
title: "[DOCS] "
labels: documentation
---

## Documentation Location

Specify affected file(s).

Examples:

- README.md
- INSTALL.md
- LIMITATIONS.md
- docs/architecture.md
- docs/WHY_xLaDe.md

## Issue Type

- [ ] Missing information
- [ ] Incorrect information
- [ ] Outdated information
- [ ] Unclear explanation
- [ ] Typographical issue

## Description

Describe the issue.

## Suggested Improvement

Describe how the documentation could be improved.

## Additional Context
